# Secondary Synthesis Data

## Purpose

Stores Tier 3 data from community handbooks and secondary wikis. Used for topic discovery and cross-checking, never as evidence.

## Examples of Sources That Belong Here

- GenshinLore / 日月全事 handbook excerpts (topic index only)
- BWiki structured metadata (if extracted)
- Community-curated region/character overviews

## Allowed Use

- Topic discovery and orientation
- CN community cross-check
- Source-gap discovery (identifying what primary sources to look for)
- Overview reading for agent context

## Disallowed Use

- Canon proof
- source_evidence_id
- Claim mapping evidence
- Relationship proof
- Status upgrades
- Treating as primary source

## Note

Not canon by itself. All content here is community synthesis and requires primary-source backtrace before any downstream use. A handbook saying "X is true" means "the community believes X" — not that X is canon.
